channel.title: How Much Vitamin D on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in How Much Vitamin D on VitaminDWiki

item.title: US RDA Vitamin D math mistakes cost the world about one Trillion dollars annually
item.description:
The US Institute of Medicine made 4 Vitamin D math mistakes in 2010

The IoM finally agreed that they made math mistakes in 2017

Instead of RDA = 600 IU, it should have been 8,800 IU (14X higher)

However, an IoM panel did not want to be embarrassed by publicly admitting mistakes.

The world copied the US mistake of 600 IU

$1 trillion math

  • Global health spending for 2018 = $8.3 trillion

item.title: Personalized treatment of Vitamin D
item.description:
• 23+ Personalization factors for Vitamin D treatment:
      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D: not one size, type, form, route for all - Jan 2022
      • VitaminDWiki – Increased Vitamin D response if take cofactors, etc
      • VitaminDWiki – Reasons for low response to vitamin D
      • VitaminDWiki – PTH and Vitamin D - many studies
      • VitaminDWiki – How you might double your response to vitamin D
      • Personalized dosing: 70 to 1 differences in doses for vitamin D treatment of Breast Cancer
      • The Power of Vitamin D: Is the Future in Precision Nutrition through Personalized Supplementation Plans? - April 2024
      • Factors to take into account when interpreting 25-hydroxy-vitamin D serum levels – March 2024
      • Perhaps 100X difference in BLOOD-Level responses to identical Vitamin D dosing
      • Perhaps a 500X difference in CELL-Level responses to identical Vitamin D dosing

23+ Personalization factors for Vitamin D treatment:

  1. Body size: less for youths, more for obese

item.title: SciAm - No benefit from more than 20 ng of Vitamin D (nope)
item.description:
Download the Scientific American PDF from VitaminDWiki

“National population sampling showed that most people were already getting enough of the vitamin”

“…most people probably don’t need supplements”

“…noting that the majority of the population is just fine at 16 ng/ml.”

“…Levels have actually risen since [2010]” Actually, levels have fallen

Describes the failure of 4 trials that used too little vitamin D

Does not mention the >700 successful Vitamin D Randomized Controled Trials (see below)

item.title: Canadian Vitamin D recommendations not updated in 13 years
item.description:
• Canada
      • 700+ studies since 2009 have found that much more vitamin D is needed
      • Sample of studies in VitaminDWiki

Canada

Canadian DRI

700+ studies since 2009 have found that much more vitamin D is needed

More than 700 Intervention Trials in VitaminDWiki since the IoM decision

Intervention - Vitamin D by date

Sample of studies in VitaminDWiki

  • Third study found that Infants needed 1600 IU of vitamin D – JAMA RCT May 2013

item.title: Response to 1,000 IU of vitamin D daily for 6 months – 40 percent above 30 ng (small study)
item.description:
• Necessity of daily 1000-IU vitamin D supplementation for maintaining a sufficient vitamin D status
      • See all VitaminDWiki RESPONSE charts Click Here

Necessity of daily 1000-IU vitamin D supplementation for maintaining a sufficient vitamin D status

J Med Invest. 2022;69(1.2):135-140. doi: 10.2152/jmi.69.135.

Yuya Ikezumi 1, Yasushi Matsuura 1, Teruhiro Morishita 1, Noriko Ide 1, Isao Kitada 1, Takafumi Katayama 2, Rie Tsutsumi 3, Hiroshi Sakaue 3, Yutaka Taketani 4, Koichi Sairyo 5, Eiji Takeda 1

item.title: Vitamin D: not one size, type, form, route for all
item.description:
• Vitamin D: Dosing, levels, form, and route of administration: Does one approach fit all?
      • Study says vitamin D needed varies with
      • Vitamin D IU needed varies with
      • VitaminDWiki - Personalized treatment of Vitamin D

Vitamin D: Dosing, levels, form, and route of administration: Does one approach fit all?

Reviews in Endocrine and Metabolic Disorders (2021) 22:1201-1218 https://doi.org/10.1007/s11154-021-09693-7

John P. Bilezikian • Anna Maria Formenti • Robert A. Adler • Neil Binkley • Roger Bouillon Marise Lazaretti-Castro • Claudio Marcocci • Nicola Napoli8 • Rene Rizzoli9 • Andrea Giustina2 Division of Endocrinology, Escola Paulista de Medicina - Universidade Federal de Sao Paulo (EPM-UNIFESP), Sao Paulo, Brazil

item.title: Take 50,000 IU of Vitamin D weekly for 2-4 months, then get a test
item.description:
Vitamin D Dosing: Basic Principles and a Brief Algorithm (2021 Update)

Nutrients 2021, 13,4415. https://doi.org/10.3390/nu13124415

Andrius Bleizgys. Clinic of Internal Diseases, Family Medicine and Oncology, Faculty of Medicine, Vilnius University Santariskiu 2, LT-08661 Vilnius, Lithuania; andrius.bleizgys@gmail.com

Abstract:

Nowadays, in modern societies, many people can be at high risk to have low vitamin D levels. Therefore, testing of serum 25-hydroxy-vitamin D (25OH-D) levels should be performed before prescribing them vitamin D supplementation. However, in some cases the 25OH-D level assessment is not available at the right moment, e.g., due to mandatory quarantine of COVID-19 outpatients. Therefore, such patients could be advised to start taking moderate vitamin D doses (e.g., 4000 IU/day for adults), and their 25-OH-D levels could be checked later. The proposed algorithm also comprises vitamin D dosing principles when baseline 25OH-D levels are known.

item.title: 34 clinical practice Vitamin D guidelines, huge diversity
item.description:
Updated page 15 Clinical guidelines now recommend vitamin D – Nov 2021

      • Vitamin D recommendations in clinical guidelines:
      • Dose size needed has increasing much faster than any consensus can ever be made
      • Lack of any consensus

Vitamin D recommendations in clinical guidelines:

A systematic review, quality evaluation and analysis of potential predictors - Sept 2021

Int J Clin Pract. 2021 Sep 6;e14805. doi: 10.1111/ijcp.14805

D Fraile Navarro 1 2 3, A López-García-Franco 1 2, E Niño de Guzmán 4, M Rabassa 4, R Zamanillo Campos 5 6 7, H Pardo-Hernandez 8 9, I Ricci-Cabello 5 7 9, C Canelo-Aybar 10 11, J F Meneses-Echavez 12 13, J J Yepes-Nuñez 14 15, J Kuindersma 16, I Gich-Saladich 4 9 17, P Alonso-Coello 4 9

item.title: How much vitamin D is needed ( perhaps 50 ng for infections)
50,000 IU vitamin D weekly to avoid Osteroporosis after Breast Cancer
item.description:
:: Note: Asked for the location of the equation Nov 25, 2020 ::

Practical Vitamin D Supplementation Using Machine Learning

J Bone Metab 2020;27(2):111-117

Tyler Fugere, Zhongning Jim Chen, Issam Makhoul

Division of Hematology and Oncology, Department of Internal Medicine, University of Arkansas for Medical Sciences, Little Rock, AR, USA

Study was trying to increase the Vitamin D levels after Breast Cancer so as to avoid developing osteoporosis

  • One pill every two weeks gives you all the vitamin D most adults need

item.title: 60,000 IU dose of VItamin D (weekly, monthly) is popular in India
item.description:
Available as both powder (added to food or drinks) and capsules

  • AIWO Amazon Nov 2020

  • CADILA (Vitamin D3-Cholecalciferol) 60000 IU, Pack of 5 x 4 Capsules, Once a Week Amazon India Nov 2020

  • Appears to be 8 cents per capsule

    • Amazon India does not ship to US but This does I placed an order Nov 21

  • Vitamin D Supplements in the Indian Market - 2016   PDF

Dosing Recommendations by Sharan

  • 0- 10 ng/ml:- 60,000 IU twice a week for 4 weeks followed by once a week for 6 weeks for levels to reach above 30 ng/ml

item.title: 50,000 IU Vitamin D weekly was the most popular for Breast Cancer
item.description:
Practical Vitamin D Supplementation Using Machine Learning

J Bone Metab. 2020 May;27(2):111-117. doi: 10.11005/jbm.2020.27.2.111

Tyler Fugere 1, Zhongning Jim Chen 1, Issam Makhoul 1

Women with breast cancer.

Wrongly considered than 20 ng was a high enough level of vitamin D

Need more to get to 30 ng of 40 ng

Need more if overweight or obese

Unclear how long for the vitamin D levels to plateau

There may be a on-line calculator - investigating

item.title: 2400 IU of vitamin D needed to get most Northern adults above 20 ng
10,000 IU Vitamin D daily often needed to get to 40-80 ng (It has been 100 years since it’s discovery)
item.description:
One Hundred Years after Vitamin D Discovery: Is There Clinical Evidence for Supplementation Doses?

Shahram Ghanaati1,2, Joseph Choukroun2, Ulrich Volz3, Rebekka Hueber3, Carlos Fernando de Almeida Barros Mourao2, Robert Sader1,2, Yoko Kawase-Koga4, Ramesh Mazhari5, Karin Amrein6, Patrick Meybohm7, Sarah Al-Maawi1,2

1Department for Oral, Cranio-Maxillofacial and Facial Plastic Surgery, Medical Center of the Goethe University Frankfurt,

2FORM (Frankfurt Orofacial Regenerative Medicine)-Lab, Department for Oral, Cranio-Maxillofacial and Facial Plastic Surgery, Medical Center of the Goethe University Frankfurt, Germany, 7Department of Anaesthesiology, University Hospital Wuerzburg, Wuerzburg, Germany,

item.title: How I am reminded to take my Vitamin D once every 4 days
item.description:
I relabeled my pillbox

A visual reminder of when to take my vitamin D

If I happen to miss that day, I take them the next day or so.

Currently I am taking 2 capsules of 50,000 IU every 4 days

    Which is an average of 25,000 IU per day

Scores of studies have found that taking vitamin D infrequently is Better than Daily

    Unaware of a single study which has found daily to be better

item.title: 10,000 IU of Vitamin D taken daily for 3 years is safe – RCT
item.description:
Safety of High-Dose Vitamin D Supplementation: Secondary Analysis of a Randomized Controlled Trial.

J Clin Endocrinol Metab. 2019 Nov 20. pii: dgz212. doi: 10.1210/clinem/dgz212.

Billington EO1, Burt LA1, Rose MS2, Davison EM1, Gaudet S1, Kan M1, Boyd SK1, Hanley DA1.

124 adults (age 60) in each group
Calcium was ADDED daily to achieve 1200+ mg/day
       Note: High dose groups often RESTRICT Calcium, 750 mg seems to be a good level
Response rangeg from 30 to 120 ng
Response dropped during 3rd year
       Did the genes adjust?
Very few adverse events

item.title: Increased Vitamin D response if take cofactors, etc
item.description:
Response by two groups taking 10,000 IU of Vitamin D (2017?)
GrassrootsHealth ((Cluster headaches virtually eliminated in 7,000 people with high-dose vitamin D and cofactors - Feb 2022 Cluster Headache))
Vitamin D level 64 ng 83 ng    (24% higher)
Cofactors unknown Yes: Mg, Omega-3, Boron, etc
Number of tests 1599 166
Demographics Caucasian Caucasian

See also VitaminDWiki

  • Overview Vitamin D Dose-Response

item.title: Poland sets the Vitamin D upper limit to 2,000 IU (wrong)
item.description:
Toxicity (when also taking cofactors) appears to be 50X higher

Overview Toxicity of vitamin D has the following chart

Without cofactors, the toxicity level is 6X higher (12,000 IU)

item.title: Treating Vitamin D deficiency in senior women – such as 50,000 IU daily for 15 days then twice a month – Review
item.description:
Treatment of vitamin D insufficiency in postmenopausal women: a randomized clinical trial.

JAMA Intern Med 2015; 175: 1612-1621.

Hansen KE, Johnson RE, Chambers KR, et al.

Download the Hansen PDF from VitaminDWiki

INTRODUCTION: We reviewed the most effective vitamin D3 regimen for vitamin D deficiency in postmenopausal women.

MATERIAL AND METHODS:

We searched for studies and clinical trials conducted on healthy postmenopausal women published on PubMed from 2000 to 2018 using the term “Vitamin D deficiency” combined with the following terms: “dose”, “supplement”, “supplementation”, “cholecalciferol” or “cholecalciferol dose”. We identified 1376 articles which matched the search criteria. Based on reviewing the title and abstract, 17 articles were eligible for a full-text review. Of those, 12 manuscripts were ultimately included.

item.title: 10,000 IU of Vitamin D for 7 years with no excessive Calcium in 4,800 patients
item.description:
Daily oral dosing of vitamin D3 using 5000 TO 50,000 international units a day in long-term hospitalized patients: Insights from a seven year experience

Journal of Steroid Biochemistry & Molecular Biology https://doi.Org/10.1016/j.jsbmb.2018.12.010

Patrick J McCullough MD1,2, Douglas S Lehrer MD1,2, Jeffrey Amend RN2.

1 Department of Psychiatry, Wright State University School of Medicine, Dayton, Ohio, 45435

2 Summit Behavioral Healthcare, Cincinnati, Ohio, 45237.

Overview Toxicity of vitamin D has the following chart

item.title: 2,000 IU Vitamin D if healthy. More if overweight or elderly - Dr. Greger
item.description:
After all that work plowing through the new science, the same 2,000 IU per day recommendation I made in 2011 remains (for those not getting enough sun): http://nutritionfacts.org/2011/09/12/dr-gregers-2011-optimum-nutrition-recommendations/.

The other videos in this series include:

  • Do Vitamin D Supplements Help with Diabetes, Weight Loss, and Blood Pressure ?

  • Will You Live Longer If You Take Vitamin D Supplements?

  • The Optimal Dose of Vitamin D Based on Natural Levels

item.title: Biology of Vitamin D – 30ng min., 50ng preferred, 1000X lower cost than health problem
Comparing High-dose vitamin D therapies
item.description:
• Comparing high-dose protocols
      • Vitamin D Cofactors in a nutshell has the following
      • Overview Toxicity of vitamin D has the following
      • See also VitaminDWiki

Comparing high-dose protocols
Dr. Coimbra
books ((High-Dose Vitamin D Therapy – book July 2018		 2018)) ((Multiple Sclerosis and (lots of) Vitamin D - book by patient on Coimbra protocol - Feb 2016 2016)) Dr. Somerville
Optimal Dose		 ((Sleep problems cured by vitamin D, etc. – workshops and patient workbooks – Gominak 2018 Dr. Gominak)) ((Cluster and Migraine headache treatment protocol - Sept 2023 Mr. Batcheller)) ((The End of Alzheimer’s and Dementia if adjust Vitamin D, B-12, Iron, Omega-3, etc. Dr. Bredsen))
End of Alz.
Health problem Multiple Sclerosis
autoimmune, PD		 sleep, flu, pain,
obesity, etc.		 Sleep Cluster, Migraine
Headaches		 Alzheimer’s
Park. being added
Number of people
(2019)		 30,000
by 2022		 5,000 5,000 8,000
(2023)		 >1,000 ?
Vitamin D target PTH is target
typ: 150ng of D		 100-140+ ng 60-80 ng PTH is target
typ: 80 ng of D		 40-60 ng
Vitamin D daily dose
(K = 1,000 IU)		 20K - 200K
1,000 IU/kg		 30K 2K + monthly
test increasing
dose until goal		 4K - 40K
110 IU/kg		 ?
((Overview: Omega-3 many benefits include helping vitamin D Omega-3)) ✻ O-3 O-3 - - - O-3 O-3
((Overview Magnesium and vitamin D Magnesium)) ✻ Mg Mg - - - Mg (400 mg) -
((Overview Vitamin K and Vitamin D Vitamin K2)) K2 (no longer?) K2 - - - K2 -
Vitamin B… B2, B9, ((Vitamin B12 B12)) B3 B50-B100
3 months		 B50 B12
((Zinc and Vitamin D Zinc)) ✻ Zn - - - Zn -
((Vitamin D and Boron Boron)) *** ?** B - - - B -
((Calcium hazards and bioavailability Calcium))
Minimize rock-based Ca		 Decrease Ca - - - Ca -
((Vitamin D and Vitamin A Vitamin A))
avoid extremes		 avoid A avoid A - - - A -
Other Choline
Selenium
Co-Q 10		 - - - Co-Q 10 -
Loading dose
Days instead of months		 - - - - - - - - - Loading
“Cluster Balm”		 -

Most highly successful uses of high-dose Vitamin D have a lot in common

item.title: Larger doses to those who were more insufficient, got all to 34 ng of Vitamin D
item.description:
Effects of Stratified Vitamin D Supplementation in Middle-Aged and Elderly Individuals with Vitamin D Insufficiency.

Horm Metab Res. 2018 Oct;50(10):747-753. doi: 10.1055/a-0746-5031. Epub 2018 Oct 12.

Lu Y1, Fu X1, Zhang L1, Liu M1, Cheng X1, Yan S1, Li N1, Miao X1, Sun B1, Li C1.

Department of Geriatric Endocrinology, Chinese PLA General Hospital, Beijing, China.

After 9 months of supplementation: 14 ng ==> 34 ng

Dose size varied only with degree of Vitamin D insufficiency

item.title: 5,000 or 10,000 IU Vitamin D for 7 years both safe and effective (4700 patients, 8 months to plateau)
item.description:
• Daily oral dosing of vitamin D3 using 5000 TO 50,000 international units a day in long-term hospitalized patients: Insights from a seven year experience.
      • See also VitaminDWiki
      • Subsequent analysis of that study - no excess Calcium

Daily oral dosing of vitamin D3 using 5000 TO 50,000 international units a day in long-term hospitalized patients: Insights from a seven year experience.

J Steroid Biochem Mol Biol. 2019 Jan 3. doi: 10.1016/j.jsbmb.2018.12.010.

McCullough PJ1, Lehrer DS2, Amend J3.

item.title: Autistics have half of the response to Vitamin D – RCT
item.description:
• Blunted serum 25(OH)D response to vitamin D 3 supplementation in children with autism
      • Autistics have 1/2 the response to Vitamin D - perhaps poor gut bacteria

Blunted serum 25(OH)D response to vitamin D 3 supplementation in children with autism

Nutr Neurosci. 2018 Oct 10:1-6. doi: 10.1080/1028415X.2018.1529342.

Kerley CP1,2, Elnazir B3, Greally P3, Coghlan D1.

1 Department of Paediatric Medicine , National Children’s Hospital , Dublin 24 , Ireland.

2 School Biological Sciences , Dublin Institute of Technology , Kevin Street, Dublin 8 , Ireland.

item.title: All preteen aged girls in India taking 2,000 IU of vitamin D got levels above 20 ng – RCT
item.description:
• Supplementation with Three Different Daily Doses of Vitamin D3 in Healthy Pre-pubertal School Girls: A Cluster Randomized Trial Nov 2018
      • Most deficient schoolchildren got > 20 ng with 2,000 IU daily - RCT March 2019

Supplementation with Three Different Daily Doses of Vitamin D3 in Healthy Pre-pubertal School Girls: A Cluster Randomized Trial Nov 2018

Indian Pediatrics, Nov 2018, Vol 55,Issue 11, pp 951–956 https://doi.org/10.1007/s13312-018-1416-z

RAMAN KUMAR MARWAHA1, A MITHAL2, NEETU BHARI3, G SETHURAMAN3, SUSHIL GUPTA4, MANOJ SHUKLA4,

item.title: Vitamin D dose size should increase with body weight (Cystic Fibrosis in this case)
2 Vitamin D pills per month may be as good as 10 hours of exercise
item.description:
10 hours of Exercise per month

Recommended in the Journal of the American Medical Association - Nov 2018

Physical Activity Guidelines for Health and Prosperity in the United States - Viewpoint

Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki

The Physical Activity Guidelines for Americans - main study

Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki

Benefits for Adults and Older Adults

Lower risk of all-cause mortality

Lower risk of cardiovascular disease mortality

item.title: 1,200 IU of Vitamin D now recommended if you consume 3,000 calories daily (FDA) – 2018
item.description:
US FDA recommends daily value of 800 IU per 2,000 IU of calories

DV of Vitamin D = 20 micrograms = 800 IU will be on US food labels in 2020

It is the MINIMUM amount to maintain health

The amount recommended is proportional to the actual calories consumed

Many people consume >3,000 calories/day

Many tall people consume >3,000 calories/day

Most counties now consume >3,000 calories/day

web

Daily value replaced Recommended Daily Allowance (RDA)

item.title: 2,000 IU of Vitamin D is not enough to maintain levels above 30 ng – RCT
item.description:
Maintenance Dose of Vitamin D: How Much Is Enough?

J Bone Metab. 2018 Aug;25(3):161-164. doi: 10.11005/jbm.2018.25.3.161. Epub 2018 Aug 31.

Sadat-Ali M1, Al-Anii FM1, Al-Turki HA2, AlBadran AA1, AlShammari SM1.

1 Department of Orthopaedic Surgery, King Fahd Hospital of the University, Imam AbdulRahman Bin Faisal University, Al-Khobar, Saudi Arabia.

2 Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology, King Fahd Hospital of the University, Imam AbdulRahman Bin Faisal University, Al-Khobar, Saudi Arabia.

13 ng + 50,000 IU weekly for 3 months ==> 37 ng (good)
2,000 IU daily for next 3 months ==> 20 ng (not good)

item.title: Alaska recommends more vitamin D: Infancy 800 IU, Pregnancy 1400 IU (avoid rickets)
item.description:
State workgroup recommends more vitamin D for Alaskan children, pregnant women

“The Alaska Vitamin D Workgroup recently formulated Alaska-specific vitamin D supplement recommendations. It recommends clinicians in the 49th state consider prescribing double the nationally recommended amount for breastfed infants.”

Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki

See also VitaminDWiki

  • Alaskan Resolutions to increase vitamin D
